subcategory: task management, project tracking, hierarchical task list with status indicators
use_cases: Agent workflow visualization with MCP server tool integrations
Multi-level hierarchical task tracking with dependencies
Progress monitoring with animated status indicators
Priority-based task organization for productivity tools
ai_summary: Animated hierarchical task management component featuring nested subtasks with real-time status updates, priority indicators, and tool integrations for AI agent workflows. Uses Framer Motion LayoutGroup for smooth morph animations on state changes, displaying task hierarchies with status icons (completed, in-progress, need-help) and optional MCP server tool references.
